title: Add Adam weight decay regularization
methodology: Added a small weight decay term (1e-4) to the existing Adam optimizer while leaving the affine-augmented 2-conv CNN, loss, and training loop unchanged. This isolates L2-style optimizer regularization as the only experimental change.
motivation: Research brief promising direction: try regularization. Chosen as an untried regularization follow-up to exp-031 and the current brief, without repeating dropout, label smoothing, or AdamW trials.
